prompt.text:
Using PepsiCo, Inc.'s Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 27, 2025 (filed February 3, 2026), compute constant-currency organic net revenue growth for FY2025 vs FY2024 for **EMEA** and **LatAm Foods**.

1. Extract reported net revenue for EMEA and LatAm Foods for FY2025 and FY2024 from the segment reporting table (Note 1 — Segment Reporting).
2. Extract **weighted-average exchange rates** disclosed in Note 1 (EUR/USD at minimum for EMEA) — do not use spot or year-end rates.
3. Using Python, compute constant-currency organic growth for each segment. Cross-check your result against the organic revenue growth percentages disclosed in MD&A (Net Revenue and Organic Revenue Performance).
4. Produce a growth table (USD millions and %) and a short assumption log citing note/section for every input.

Constraints:
- Use only the specified 10-K and cited sections within it.
- Every numeric value must include a citation (document, note/section, table, column).
- Python required to verify CC growth arithmetic.
- No Buy/Hold/Sell or price target.
- If a value cannot be verified, mark it unverified — do not interpolate.
constraints: Weighted-average FX from filing — not spot rates
Python required for CC growth verification

supplementary_documents.note: Prior-year filing for cross-check only — scored period is FY2025 10-K
